parameters.content:
## Compara se o usuário existe
Verifica se ja exite via CPF

## GERA NOME USUARIO
comprara com a base de usuarios

## Informa GLPI inconsitencia de dados.
**Double click** to edit me. [Guide](https://docs.n8n.io/workflows/sticky-notes/)

options.systemMessage:
You are a strict information extraction algorithm.

Extract structured data ONLY from the provided text description.

The input text may contain concatenated information without spaces or separators.
You MUST correctly separate and normalize the data.

Extraction rules:

- "nome": Full name in proper case (capitalize each word).
- "cpf": Extract exactly 11 digits and format as XXX.XXX.XXX-XX.
- "celular": Extract Brazilian mobile number. Keep country code if present. Format as +55 XX 9XXXX-XXXX or XX 9XXXX-XXXX.
- "nascimento": Extract date of birth and format as DD/MM/YYYY.
- "cargo": Extract ONLY the job title. If the company name appears together (e.g., "Cargo - Empresa"), remove the company from this field.
- "empresa": Extract ONLY the company name. If it appears together with the job title separated by "-", split correctly.
- "inicio": Extract start date and format as DD/MM/YYYY.

Important rules:
- If a value is not found, omit the field.
- Never invent information.
- Never merge fields.
- Never include company name inside "cargo".
- Output must be valid JSON only.
